title: T02 — System Card (Phase 1 Scope)
description: Provider/deployer identity, modality, deployment context, and declaration_verification map produced by the Phase 1 Scope Agent. EU AI Act Art. 13 §3.

engagement_id.description: Unique identifier for this audit engagement.

provider_name.description: Legal name of the AI system provider (Art. 13 §3).

deployer_name.description: Legal name of the deployer, if different from provider (Art. 13 §3).

system_name.description: Commercial or internal name of the AI system.

version.description: Semantic version of the AI system under audit.

intended_purpose.description: Intended purpose as verified by Phase 1 (Art. 13 §3).

declared_modality.description: Client-declared primary technical modality (from Stage A).

verified_modality.description: Phase 1 verified modality (may differ from declared).

deployment_context.description: Primary deployment context, verified by Phase 1.

is_llm_or_agentic.description: True if verified_modality is llm, agentic, or gpai — triggers L-branch routing.

provider_elects_third_party.description: Whether the provider elects third-party notified-body assessment (Art. 43 §1(b)).

gdpr_overlap.description: Whether the system processes personal data subject to GDPR.

special_category_data.description: Whether the system processes special-category data (Art. 10 §5).

declaration_verification.description: Map of field name to Phase 1 verification verdict (§3.6, §8.4). Any 'mismatch' triggers HITL.

phase1_summary.description: Narrative summary of Phase 1 scope verification findings (Art. 13 §3).

art5_prohibited.description: True if Phase 1 determined the system is prohibited under Art. 5. Engagement halted if true.

gpai_screening_result.description: GPAI screening narrative if gpai_general_purpose was declared or detected.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this artefact was generated.
